CLASS_TYPE.title: Class Type
CLASS_TYPE.desc2: Enabling the right class types to match how your organization actually runs its classes

stripeProductDescription.CLASS_TYPE_REGULAR: Fixed-term courses with a set schedule and start/end date. Ideal for cohorts or semester-based classes where all students begin and end together. Perfect for traditional academic programs, certification courses, and structured learning paths.
stripeProductDescription.CLASS_TYPE_RECURRING: Ongoing classes where students can join at any time, continuing indefinitely without a set end date. Perfect for memberships, continuous enrollment programs, and drop-in style classes where students progress at their own pace.
stripeProductDescription.CLASS_TYPE_APPOINTMENT: Flexible, private session booking—students can select available time slots for 1-on-1 or small group classes. Ideal for tutoring services, consultation sessions, and personalized learning experiences.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_OWN_BRANDING: Remove Flowclass branding from system emails and communications. Use your own school name and sender address for a fully branded experience. Make every communication look like it comes directly from your institution.
stripeProductDescription.NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_EMAIL_ONLY: Send notifications and reminders to students and staff via email only. (Included in all plans) Reliable communication that works across all devices and platforms.
stripeProductDescription.NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_EMAIL_WHATSAPP_OFFI: Send notifications via official WhatsApp Business (using Twilio), in addition to email. Reach students on their preferred platform with professional, reliable messaging that maintains your brand reputation.
stripeProductDescription.NOTIFICATION_CHANNEL_EMAIL_WHATSAPP_UNOF: Send notifications via our unofficial WhatsApp channel, in addition to email. No need for your own WhatsApp Business account. Perfect for schools that want WhatsApp communication without the setup complexity.
stripeProductDescription.PROMOTION_FEES_BASIC: Basic promotion tools: Apply discount coupons to boost enrollment or offer special rates. Increase student retention and attract new enrollments with flexible pricing strategies.
stripeProductDescription.PROMOTION_FEES_ADVANCED: Advanced promotions: Enable discount coupons plus let new students book trial lessons online. Convert prospects into paying students with risk-free trial experiences and automated enrollment workflows.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_STUDENT_PORTAL: Give students access to a self-service portal for managing bookings, making reschedule requests, and viewing invoices and receipts. Reduce administrative workload and improve student satisfaction with 24/7 self-service access.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_TUTOR_CENTRAL: Enable Tutor Central: Tutors can log in to view their schedule, manage classes, take attendance, and track their salary. Streamline tutor management and provide transparency in scheduling and compensation.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_QRCODE_ATTENDANCE: Simplify attendance tracking with QR code check-in—students scan to mark attendance for both online and in-person lessons. Reduce administrative overhead and improve accuracy in attendance records.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_RESCHEDULE_REQUEST: Let students request to reschedule classes directly through the platform, saving admin time and improving flexibility. Automated workflow for handling schedule changes while maintaining class capacity limits.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_APPLY_MULTIPLE_COURSES: Allow students to register for multiple courses or class types in a single profile. Streamline enrollment for families or returning students with unified account management.
stripeProductDescription.FEATURE_ENABLE_CREDIT_SYSTEM: Enable a credit or prepaid system so students can purchase credits in advance and use them to book classes flexibly. Improve cash flow and offer flexible payment options for your students.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USER_100: Base plan for up to 100 students. Suited for small groups or solo tutors. Perfect for individual instructors, small learning centers, or schools just starting their digital transformation journey.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USER_500: Base plan for up to 500 students. Ideal for growing education centres. Supports expanding institutions that need to scale their operations while maintaining quality service delivery.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USER_1500: Base plan for up to 1,500 students. For medium-sized schools or multi-branch operations. Handles the complexity of multiple programs and locations with robust user management.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USER_3000: Base plan for up to 3,000 students. For larger institutions with multiple programs. Designed for established education businesses that need enterprise-level scalability.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USER_5000: Base plan for up to 5,000 students. For large, established education businesses. Supports complex organizational structures and high-volume operations.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USER_UNLIMITED: No limit on student numbers. Scale as much as you want. Perfect for rapidly growing institutions or those with ambitious expansion plans. No more worrying about hitting user limits.
stripeProductDescription.BASE_USERS: The number of student accounts included in your plan. Determines your maximum enrollment. Each student gets their own profile with access to classes, payments, and communication features.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_SCHOOL: Manage multiple schools or centres under one account. Pay only for the number of locations you need. Centralized administration with location-specific customization and reporting.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN: Add extra admin staff who can manage bookings, payments, and school operations. Distribute administrative responsibilities across your team while maintaining security and access control.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR: Add extra tutors who can access their schedules, manage classes, and take attendance. Empower your teaching staff with the tools they need to deliver excellent student experiences.
stripeProductDescription.INTEGRATION_GOOGLE_DRIVE: Sync documents and class materials with Google Drive for streamlined file management. Keep all your educational resources organized and accessible across your team.
stripeProductDescription.SETUP_FEE_SCHOOL_1: One-time setup and data migration fee for your first school or centre. Our team will import your data and configure your system for a smooth start. Includes data migration from Excel or other systems.
stripeProductDescription.SETUP_FEE_INSTITUTION_2: One-time setup fee for your second school or institution. Includes data migration and configuration. Our experts ensure seamless integration with your existing operations.
stripeProductDescription.SET_UP_FEE_INSTITUTION_3: One-time setup fee for your third school or institution. Includes data migration and configuration. Streamlined setup process for expanding multi-location operations.
stripeProductDescription.SETUP_FEE_PER_INSTITUTION_AFTER_4: One-time setup fee for each additional school (fourth and onwards). Includes data migration and configuration. Volume pricing for institutions with extensive multi-location needs.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_INSTITUTION_4: Per year per additional school (fourth and onwards). Includes ongoing support and management for each additional location. Professional services to ensure smooth operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_INSTITUTION_10: Per year per additional school (tenth and onwards). Includes ongoing support and management for each additional location. Efficient management for large-scale multi-location operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_INSTITUTION_20: Per year per additional school (twentieth and onwards). Includes ongoing support and management for each additional location. Streamlined management for institutions with extensive geographic reach.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_INSTITUTION_50: Per year per additional school (fiftieth and onwards). Includes ongoing support and management for each additional location. Enterprise-level services for major educational organizations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_INSTITUTION_UNLIMITED: Per year per additional school (unlimited and onwards). Includes ongoing support and management for each additional location. Comprehensive support for unlimited expansion.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_INSTITUTION_1: Per year per additional school (first and onwards). Includes ongoing support and management for each additional location. Professional services for growing institutions.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_4: Per year per additional admin (fourth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Efficient admin management for expanding administrative teams.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_10: Per year per additional admin (tenth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Streamlined admin management for large administrative operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_20: Per year per additional admin (twentieth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Professional admin management for enterprise-level operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_30: Per year per additional admin (thirtieth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Efficient admin management for major educational institutions.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_50: Per year per additional admin (fiftieth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Streamlined admin management for large-scale operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_UNLIMITED: Per year per additional admin (unlimited and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Comprehensive admin management for unlimited administrative expansion.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_ADMIN_1: Per year per additional admin (first and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional admin. Professional admin management for growing administrative teams.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_2: Per year per additional tutor (second and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Efficient tutor management for expanding teaching teams.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_4: Per year per additional tutor (fourth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Streamlined tutor management for growing educational operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_10: Per year per additional tutor (tenth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Professional tutor management for medium-sized teaching operations.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_20: Per year per additional tutor (twentieth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Efficient tutor management for large teaching teams.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_50: Per year per additional tutor (fiftieth and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Streamlined tutor management for major educational institutions.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_UNLIMITED: Per year per additional tutor (unlimited and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Comprehensive tutor management for unlimited teaching expansion.
stripeProductDescription.MULTIPLE_TUTOR_1: Per year per additional tutor (first and onwards). Includes ongoing access and management for each additional tutor. Professional tutor management for growing teaching operations.
stripeProductDescription.CUSTOMER_SUPPORT_ADVANCED: Advanced customer support with faster response times and dedicated account management. Includes priority ticket handling, extended support hours, and personalized assistance for complex implementation needs.
stripeProductDescription.CUSTOMER_SUPPORT_BASIC: Basic customer support with standard response times. Includes email and chat support during business hours, comprehensive documentation, and community resources for self-service assistance.
stripeProductDescription.CUSTOMER_SUPPORT_EXPERT: Expert-level customer support with immediate response times and dedicated account manager. Includes 24/7 priority support, custom training sessions, and strategic consultation for enterprise-level implementations.

student.question: How many students will you have?
student.description: Select the total number of students you expect to have in the coming year.

school.question: How many schools or centers will you manage?
school.description: Select the number of schools or centers you wish to manage.

setup.question: Would you like our team to help set up your classes and migrate data?
setup.description: We offer a professional setup and migration service. Our team will help you import your classes, students, and schedules from Excel or other systems, so you can get started faster and with less hassle.
setup.yesLabel: Yes, I would like assistance with setup and data migration
setup.noLabel: No, I will set up everything myself

adminStaff.question: How many admin staff will be using the system?
adminStaff.description: Choose the total number of admin staff (excluding tutors) who need system access. Admin staff refers to users who help manage the platform, for example:

tutor.question: How many tutors will be using the system?
tutor.description: Choose the number of tutors who need system access. Tutor refers to any staff member who teaches classes or interacts directly with students for educational purposes. Each tutor can:
tutor.viewRateLabel: View their hourly rate and expected salary

classType.question: What class types do you need?
classType.description: Enabling the right class types ensures your scheduling, enrollment, and payment workflows match how your organization actually runs its classes.

schedule.question: How are your classes typically scheduled?
schedule.optionFixedSchedule: Fixed schedule, the time slot is set by you (e.g. every Monday 4–6 PM)
schedule.optionFlexibleSchedule: Flexible, students can book time slots whenever we have an available time slot

entering.question: Can students join at any time, or only at the start of a new phase (e.g., a new month or term)?
entering.optionRegularLabel: Every student ends the class at the exact same lesson, regardless of when the joined the class (e.g. the class always end on the last Saturday 3:00 p.m. of the month)
entering.optionRecurringLabel: Student ends their classes at different lessons, according to when they started joining the class (e.g. the class always end at the 8th lesson)

classType.eventDescription: For one-off workshops, seminars, or trial lessons.
classType.membershipDescription: For ongoing access and benefits with a membership fee.
classType.includedByDefault: Both Event and Membership class types are always included at no extra cost.

suggestion.label: Here’s our suggested class types according to your operations:
suggestion.regularDescription: For fixed-term courses with a set schedule and start/end dates
suggestion.recurringDescription: For ongoing classes students can join anytime, with no end date.
suggestion.appointmentDescription: For flexible, bookable time slots and private sessions.
suggestion.noSuggestion: The current class types should be enough for your needs.

addons.question: Do you need any of the following premium features?
addons.description: You can enhance your experience by enabling the following optional features. Each add-on is priced separately and can be added or removed at any time.

featureBranding.question: Do you want to use your own branding in emails?
featureBranding.desc: Would you like to remove Flowclass branding and use your own name or email as the sender for system emails?
featureBranding.yesLabel: Yes, enable custom email sender and branding removal
featureBranding.noLabel: No, I’m fine with Flowclass branding

featurePortal.question: Would you like to give students access to a self-service portal?
featurePortal.desc: Do you want your students to have their own portal for managing their classes, making reschedule requests, submitting questions, and viewing invoices?
featurePortal.noLabel: No, I don’t need this feature

featureTutorCentral.question: Do you want each tutor to be able to log into the system?
featureTutorCentral.desc: Would you like to use Tutor Central, which includes a tutor database, automated salary calculations, tutor availability management, and attendance options?
featureTutorCentral.noLabel: No, I don’t need this feature

featureQrCode.question: Do you want to track attendance using QR codes?
featureQrCode.desc: Would you like to enable QR code attendance so students can check in by scanning a code? This streamlines attendance tracking for both in-person and online lessons.
featureQrCode.noLabel: No, I don’t need this feature

steps.optionNoLabel: No, I don’t need this feature

creditSystem.question: Do you want to enable a Credit Wallet for every student account?
creditSystem.desc: Would you like to handle refunds instantly as credits, give manual discounts, and encourage repeat enrolments by rewarding parents and students with credits they can use anytime for any course?
creditSystem.noLabel: No, I don’t need this feature

notification.question: Do you want to notify students using WhatsApp?
notification.description: Choose how you’d like to communicate important updates and reminders to your students. By default, email notifications are included. Enable WhatsApp to reach students more directly and conveniently.

wa.question: Do you want to send notifications to students via WhatsApp?
wa.yesLabel: Yes, I want to use WhatsApp notifications

official.question: Have you created your own Meta (Facebook) official WhatsApp Business account?
official.yesLabel: Yes, I have an official WhatsApp Business account
official.noLabel: No, I don’t have an official account
official.noDesc: You can use our unofficial WhatsApp integration

promotion.question: Which promotion tier would you like to enable on the platform?

descriptionList.trial: Let students easily book trial lessons online and experience a class before enrolling.
descriptionList.bundle: Offer bundle discounts, giving students special rates when they purchase multiple classes together.

overview.reviewSelection: Confirm your selection and proceed to payment

client.setupFeeFirstInvoice: One-time fee will be added to first invoice
